text:
Opera Version Information:

Version information
Version
9.10 
Build
521
Platform
FreeBSD
System
i386, 6.2-RELEASE
Qt library
3.3.7   
Java 
Java Runtime Environment installed
Browser identification

Opera/9.10 (X11; FreeBSD 6 i386; U; en)
    

I am running Opera from 'xfce-4.4.0, if that makes any difference.

1) Start Opera
2) Navigate to a page where I fill out information
3) Right click in that text area
4) Click on 'spell check'

I am presented with an error message stating that spell check is not installed. I am then redirected to a page where I
am offered the opportunity to install GNU Aspell.

I all ready have that installed on my system. For some reason, Opera is not picking up on that fact.

I have confirmed with one other user so far that this problem exists.

How-To-Repeat: Simply follow the steps I listed above.
